title: Minimum Cost to Separate Sentence Into Rows
titleCn: 将句子分隔成行的最低成本

detail.title: Minimum Cost to Separate Sentence Into Rows
detail.exampleTestcases:
"i love leetcode"
12
"apples and bananas taste great"
7
"a"
5
hints: Create an array storing all of the words in sentence separated.
Build a dp array where dp[i] represents the minimum total cost for the first i + 1 words.
